title: CordsHUD
description: Minimalistic client-side HUD showing coordinates, facing direction, and built-in zoom.
body:
CoordsHUD
Lightweight client-side HUD with coordinates and zoom.

CoordsHUD adds a clean and minimal on-screen display showing:

📍 Player coordinates (X, Y, Z)

🧭 Facing direction (N / S / E / W)

🔍 Built-in zoom (hold key)

📌 Switchable HUD position (Left / Right / Off)

Designed to be simple, lightweight, and distraction-free.

Controls
H — Toggle HUD position (Left / Right / Off)

Z — Hold to zoom

Features
Minimalistic dark background

Color formatted text

Fully client-side (safe for servers)

No performance impact
